items.title: [Remoto] Customer Success Manager (AI-first) - Wrenly
items.description:
> рҹҮ§рҹҮ· Vaga 100% remota para profissionais baseados no Brasil. A funГ§ГЈo exige **inglГӘs fluente**, entГЈo o anГәncio estГЎ em inglГӘs de propГіsito вҖ” jГЎ serve como um primeiro filtro. / This role requires fluent English, so the listing is in English by design.

## Nossa empresa

Wrenly is a bootstrapped, profitable HR / people-analytics SaaS. We regularly go up against companies like Lattice and Culture Amp вҖ” companies that raised hundreds of millions of dollars вҖ” and we're winning. We meet teams where they already work: a performance review that arrives as a Slack message, a survey that's a ping in MS Teams. We're profitable, growing every month, and deliberately lean вҖ” we use AI to punch far above our headcount.

## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

**Founding Customer Success Manager (AI-first).**

One catch: you'll do this job with **AI as your primary tool** вҖ” not as a nice-to-have, but as the way you work. Claude will be how you triage tickets, investigate our codebase, build workflows, write docs, and automate anything that can be automated. If you've put serious time into AI agents and automations (**100+ hours**), this might be the most interesting job you've seen. If you haven't, it isn't for you.

What you'll own:

- **Build a scalable AI support engine** вҖ” answer customer questions, then use AI to turn each answer into knowledge-base material so the next customer gets it instantly and the question never reaches your queue again.
- **Turn founder-led onboarding into a repeatable system** вҖ” capture what makes our founder-led onboarding great in repeatable playbooks, so every customer gets that same launch whether they're the 4th this month or the 40th.
- **Nurture and grow accounts** вҖ” become the expert customers trust and own their quarterly business reviews (QBRs), turning trust into renewals and expansion.

As the function scales, there's an opportunity to build and lead a team, with the founders backing you as you grow into it.

> рҹ’Ў **Developers, this is for you too.** A developer with real AI experience who also has customer-facing experience is a *perfect* candidate for this role. If you love building automations in Claude and talking to users, you're exactly who we want.

## Local

Remoto вҖ” **baseado no Brasil**, confortГЎvel com sobreposiГ§ГЈo ao fuso horГЎrio US Eastern (ET).

## Requisitos

**ObrigatГіrios:**
- **100+ hours hands-on with AI agents / automations** (Claude as your primary working tool). This is the real bar вҖ” if you haven't put serious time into AI, this role isn't for you.
- **Fluent English**, written and spoken.
- **Based in Brazil**, comfortable with US time-zone overlap.
- Hungry, organized, a strong writer, and comfortable building from scratch.

**DesejГЎveis:**
- 1вҖ“4 years in B2B SaaS customer success, account management, or a similar customer-facing role (ideal, not required вҖ” we care more about how you work than how long you've done it).
- A developer background counts: if you have real AI experience **and** customer-facing experience, you're a perfect fit even without a formal CS title.

## BenefГӯcios

- Competitive base compensation in **USD**, plus generous commission on the expansion revenue you generate
- Fully remote вҖ” work from wherever you're most productive
- 40-hour work week with flexible hours built around US Eastern Time overlap
- 11 days of paid time off + 9 Brazilian public holidays (**20 days off total**)
- All tools and subscriptions covered, including generous AI plans
- A real voice in product decisions and company direction from day one

## ContrataГ§ГЈo

**PJ** вҖ” hired and managed through **Deel** (simple, clean contracting).

## Como se candidatar

Watch a short video from our co-founder and find application details here:
рҹ‘ү **https://www.wrenly.ai/hiring/csm**

**Soft screen (please include):** since this is an AI-first role, send one lightweight artifact вҖ” e.g. a 2вҖ“3 min Loom walking through one AI agent/automation you built and what it saved you.

## Labels

### NГӯvel
- Pleno

### Regime
- PJ

### AlocaГ§ГЈo
- Remoto
